background: Suppose a population has 26 members identified with the letters A through Z.

task.query: You select one individual at random from this population. What is the probability of selecting individual A?
Assume person A gets selected on an initial draw, you replace person A into the sampling frame, and then take a second random draw. What is the probability of drawing person A on the second draw?
Assume person A gets selected on the initial draw and you sample again without replacement. What is the probability of drawing person A on the second draw?
